Document:
# Vampire: Umbrae
[color=#5e154e][italic]"Darkness is not the absence of light. It is the absence of witnesses."[/italic][/color]
Umbrae is the stealth and mobility class. Your wins come from picking the right place, light level, and timing. You are strongest where others are uncomfortable: in darkness, in chaos, and at short range.
## Abilities (Total Blood Threshold | Cost)
[bold](150 | (toggle))[/bold] Cloak of Darkness Toggles whether you are currently cloaking yourself in darkness. When in darkness and toggled on, you move at increased speeds.
[bold](200 | 20)[/bold] Shadow Snare You summon a trap on the ground. When crossed it will blind the target and ensnare them Flash effects can destroy it — place it in darkness and offangle.
[bold](200 | 20)[/bold] Shadow Anchor You summon a dimensional anchor after a delay. Casting again will teleport you back to the anchor. You will fake a recall after 2 minutes
[bold](300 | 20)[/bold] Dark Passage Teleports you to a targeted turf.
[bold](400 | 0)[/bold] Extinguish Absorbs light sources around you.
[bold](800 | 50)[/bold] Shadow Boxing Your shadows beat up a target while you stay close.
[bold](1000 | (toggle))[/bold] Eternal Darkness When toggled, you shroud the area around you in darkness and slowly lower the body temperature of people nearby.
